title: BD India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: BD India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Consultant Physician looking for your next big career move? BD India in Agra offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About BD India:
BD India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BD India!
